# llms.txt — WhiteMagic for LLM Context
# Format per: https://llmstxt.org/

# Project
WhiteMagic is a Python-first, polyglot-accelerated MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and tool substrate for AI agents.

## Overview
- 28 "Gana" meta-tools (PRAT mode) routing to 462 nested tools (490 callable total)
- Tool envelope contract with idempotency, `now`-determinism, stable error codes
- 8-stage middleware pipeline (sanitizer → circuit breaker → rate limiter → permissions → maturity gate → governor → core router → feedback)
- 5D holographic memory with Galactic Map lifecycle (no-delete policy)
- Dharma governance (YAML rules, Karma ledger, Harmony Vector)
- Polyglot accelerators: Rust, Haskell, Julia, Elixir, Go, Zig (functional); Koka (compiled); Mojo (blocked)

## Entry Points
- `python -m whitemagic.run_mcp` — MCP server (canonical)
- `wm doctor` — health check
- `wm init` — project scaffolding

## Key Documentation
- AI_PRIMARY.md — authoritative contract
- SYSTEM_MAP.md — repo layout + runtime state resolution
- QUICKSTART.md — 5-minute setup
- docs/GLOSSARY.md — terminology
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — design docs
